title: feat(libartifact): Modify NewArtifactStore signature for artifact events
body:
This commit introduces a new paremeter in `NewArtifactStore`, to allow external consumers to register a callback function for `artifact`-related events.

The following methods now invoke the event callback if one is provided:
- `Remove`
- `Pull`
- `Push`
- `Add`
- `Extract`
- `ExtractTarStream`

Fixes #27260 https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27324

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6451**
